title: P-018R CANCELLED Limitation on ITC Eligibility where Person becomes a Registrant - Canada.ca
content:
## P-018R CANCELLED Limitation on ITC Eligibility where Person becomes a Registrant

## This publication was cancelled
This publication has been cancelled as of 2026-06-03 and replaced with GST/HST memoradum 8-5, Becoming and Ceasing to be a Registrant .
